en.title: How a stranger's hunch about a 'no kill' animal shelter owner led to a 20-year crusade to expose a depraved secret - and finally uncover what was buried on his sprawling property
en.description: Shannon Miranda, 55, appeared to be the model animal lover by taking in thousand of cars and dogs at his Northern California shelter but his neighbor, Jennifer Raymond, 75, was always wary.

en.description_es: Shannon Miranda, de 55 años, parecía ser la modelo amante de los animales al recibir a miles de coches y perros en su refugio del norte de California, pero su vecina, Jennifer Raymond, de 75 años, siempre fue cautelosa.
